  {
    "minbytes": 21,
    "sentbytes": "21A2",
    "name": "APV3 - Ctrl entrées calculateur",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Entrée CMF : 1ère, UD, PMI-": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
